name: DeFi Protocol Selection
description: Choose the right Solana DeFi protocol for your use case

tree.question: What DeFi operation do you need?

Swap tokens (buy/sell).question: Are you building a trading UI or integrating swaps into your app?

Trading UI / best price across all DEXes.rationale: Jupiter is the #1 Solana DEX aggregator. Routes across all DEXes for best price. 70%+ of Solana swap volume goes through Jupiter.
Trading UI / best price across all DEXes.install: npm install @jup-ag/api (or use REST API directly)

Build on top of a specific AMM pool.question: Do you need concentrated liquidity (active management, higher capital efficiency)?

Yes — concentrated liquidity.rationale: Orca Whirlpools are the leading concentrated liquidity pools on Solana. Best for protocols that need precise price ranges.

No — constant product AMM (simpler).rationale: Raydium CP-Swap for standard AMM pools. Simpler to integrate, less active management needed.

Provide liquidity (earn fees).question: Do you want to actively manage your position?

Yes — active management for higher retur.rationale: Concentrated liquidity on Orca Whirlpools. Higher capital efficiency but requires monitoring and rebalancing.
Yes — active management for higher retur.risk: Impermanent loss is amplified in concentrated ranges. Must rebalance when price moves outside your range.

No — passive, set and forget.rationale: Meteora DLMM pools auto-compound. Lower returns than concentrated liquidity but zero maintenance.
No — passive, set and forget.risk: Standard impermanent loss applies. Lower returns than active management.

Lending / Borrowing.question: Do you want the best rate across protocols or to integrate a single protocol?

Best rate aggregation.rationale: Lulo automatically routes deposits to the highest-yielding lending protocol (Kamino, Marginfi, Solend, etc.).

Single protocol integration.rationale: Kamino Finance is the largest Solana lending protocol by TVL. Well-documented, audited, active development.
Single protocol integration.alternative: Marginfi — second largest, also well-audited. Use if you need cross-margin.

Perpetual futures / Leverage.rationale: Drift is the leading Solana perps DEX. Supports perpetual futures, spot margin, and prediction markets.
Perpetual futures / Leverage.alternative: Flash Trade — simpler perps, oracle-based pricing. Lower liquidity but easier integration.

Liquid staking.question: Do you need to swap between LST types or just stake SOL?

Stake SOL for an LST.rationale: Marinade (mSOL) is the most liquid Solana LST. Best DeFi integrations. Also offers native staking via Marinade Native.
Stake SOL for an LST.alternative: Jito (jitoSOL) — earns MEV rewards on top of staking yield. Higher APY but more complex.

Swap between LST types (mSOL ↔ jitoSOL ↔.rationale: Sanctum is the LST liquidity layer. Swap between any LST types with minimal slippage.

Vault / Yield strategy.rationale: GLAM Protocol for structured vaults. Build Goldman Sachs-style investment products on-chain.

Token launch / Bonding curve.rationale: Pump.fun for meme/community token launches with bonding curve. Raydium for direct LP launch.
Token launch / Bonding curve.see_also: Use the launch-token skill for detailed guidance.
